query: SELECT DISTINCT c.name, c.geography, COUNT(a.id) as missing_assets FROM companies c JOIN assets a ON c.id = a.companyId WHERE a.latitude IS NULL OR a.longitude IS NULL GROUP BY c.id, c.name, c.geography ORDER BY c.name
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user ovDZf4AdgM1wjio.bac7ad92b374 --database Rur7xAEUjvByHVg3PaP3cz --execute SELECT DISTINCT c.name, c.geography, COUNT(a.id) as missing_assets FROM companies c JOIN assets a ON c.id = a.companyId WHERE a.latitude IS NULL OR a.longitude IS NULL GROUP BY c.id, c.name, c.geography ORDER BY c.name
